notes: Executable parity for `productVariantsBulkCreate(strategy: REMOVE_STANDALONE_VARIANT)` on a product with one custom standalone variant. Shopify removes the existing custom variant, creates the submitted variant, leaves only the created option value variant-backed, and returns no userErrors.

expectedDifferences.reason: Product option IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.

Inventory item IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Created product variant IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Created inventory item IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The downstream proxy read returns locally generated product option IDs.
The downstream proxy read returns locally generated product option value IDs.
The downstream proxy read returns locally generated product variant IDs.
